title: Craft A Saddle
description: This mod lets you craft a saddle
body:
This mod lets you craft a saddle. Nothing else. This mod may or may not be updated in the future. Try the mod out and tell us what you think! If we see that a lot of people are using this mod, then we will update it often if needed. This mod supports Fabric and NeoForge.
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff8b075f33a7426629a15640f3a626bea5c1aab5.jpeg)

When it comes to hosting servers, I always trust BisectHosting. New customers can use https://www.bisecthosting.com/JaggerGTV to save 25% on their first month of a gaming server, and their dedicated support team is available 24/7 to provide you with top-notch assistance.
